title: euphrasia parviflora var. glabrescens
intro: Euphrasia parviflora var. glabrescens, also known as the small-flowered eyebright, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it beneficial for treating eye and ear infections, as well as respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Euphrasia parviflora var. glabrescens include reducing inflammation and congestion, soothing irritated tissues, and promoting overall respiratory health. Euphrasia parviflora var. glabrescens is commonly prepared as a tincture or tea, and can also be found in eye drops and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
